release_notes:
Version 2.7.9 - Instagram Interaction Stability & Modal Handling
✨ New Features & Fixes:
- Instagram: Fixed 'Like' and 'Comment' failures on both Posts and Reels.
- Instagram: Added automatic detector for login/signup modals to bypass intrusive pop-ups.
- Instagram: Implemented universal layout detection (Post vs Reel viewer) for robust element discovery.
- Instagram: Broadened selectors for interaction buttons (supporting localized 'Comentario', 'Me gusta', etc.).
